meta.title: mybetrecord — I-Tracker Yokubheja Kwezemidlalo, i-ROI kanye ne-Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Landelela konke ukubheja encwadini eyodwa eneziyalo. I-ROI, isivuno, iziteki zika-Kelly, i-CLV, amajika wokulingana, nokuthunyelwa ngaphandle - yakhelwe abantu ababheja inombolo.
meta.pricingDescription: Ileja yokubheja kwezemidlalo yamahhala enezici ezigcwele, noma i-Pro yokugawulwa kwansuku zonke okungenamkhawulo cishe ngama-$5 USD ngenyanga ngohlobo lwemali yangakini.

home.heroTitle: I-tracker yokubheja kwezemidlalo yabantu ababhejela inombolo
home.heroLead: Yeka ukuhlanganisa amaspredishithi. Ngena yonke igeja, ulandelele i-ROI kanye nesivuno, usayizi uncike no-Kelly, futhi ubone ukuthi umkhawulo wakho uhlala kuphi ngempela.
home.section1Title: Kusukela kusiphithiphithi sesipredishithi ukuya kubhukwana elinesiyalo
home.section1Sub: Iningi labathengi likhulisa izinhlelo zokusebenza zamanothi namathebhu e-Excel. i-mybetrecord ikunikeza indawo eyodwa yokurekhoda ukubheja, uxazulule imiphumela, futhi ufunde izinombolo zokusebenza okuthembekile.
home.featureOddsDesc: Amafomethi wedesimali, aseMelika, amafractional, nawe-Asian — enziwa abejwayelekile ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuze imibiko ihlale ifana.
home.featureKellyDesc: Setha i-bankroll kanye ne-edge inputs; thola osayizi besiteki abanconyiwe ngokusekelwe kumbandela we-Kelly.
home.featureRoiDesc: Izinga lesimangalo, inzuzo, inzuzo ngenyanga, kanye nekhevu yokulingana eqoqiwe yokubheja okuxazululiwe.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Sika ukusebenza kwezemidlalo, uhlobo lokubheja, i-tipster, noma ubhuki ukuze uthole ukuthi uwina kuphi futhi uvuze kuphi.
home.featureClvDesc: Rekhoda izingqinamba zokuvala futhi ulinganise i-CLV — isignali ebukhali kunemiphumela yesikhathi esifushane iyodwa.
home.featureExportDesc: Landa i-CSV, Excel, noma i-JSON. Khiqiza okhiye be-API bemibhalo nokuzenzakalela.
home.pricingSub: Zonke izici ezingezansi zifakiwe kuzo zombili izinhlelo. I-Pro isusa ikhephu yokungena yansuku zonke — cishe u-$5 USD ngenyanga ngohlobo lwemali yangakini.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Kufikela ku-5 ukubheja kanye nama-multis angu-5 ngosuku
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Ileja yokubheja egcwele — imicimbi, okukhethiwe, iziteki, imiphumela & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Wonke amafomethi wezinkinga - idesimali, i-American, i-fractional ne-Asian
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Lonke uhlobo lokubheja — wina, indlela ngayinye, ngaphezulu-ngaphansi, ama-multis & handicap
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Ukulinganisa kwesiteki sika-Kelly kusuka ku-bankroll yakho nonqenqema olushiwo
home.pricingFeatureReports: I-ROI, isivuno, izinga lesimangalo kanye nejika lokulingana elikhulayo
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Ukuhlukaniswa ngezemidlalo, uhlobo lokubheja, i-tipster & nobhuki
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Imodeli nezilinganiso zomuntu siqu ezishiwo ngomphetho weyunithi ngayinye
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Amanani okukhipha imali nokubanjwa kwemiklomelo kwabawinile
home.pricingFeatureLocale: Isixhumi esibonakalayo sezilimi eziningi nokusekelwa kwendawo yesikhathi
home.pricingNote: I-Pro cishe ingu-$5 USD ngenyanga, eboniswa ngemali yangakini. Khansela noma nini kokuthi Izilungiselelo.
home.section2Sub: Funda izibalo ezingemuva kwamamethrikhi — bese uzilandelela encwadini yakho.
home.blogRoiDesc: Izinombolo zezihloko ezimbili, ezivame ukudideka. Yazi ukuthi yimuphi ophendula umbuzo.
home.blogKellyDesc: Ukuthi ukulinganisa kwesiteki okulungile kusebenza kanjani - nokuthi kungani ababhejayo abaningi basebenzisa ingxenye encane ka-Kelly ogcwele.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Lapho i-Excel yanele - nalapho i-ledger ezinikele igcina amahora namaphutha.
home.faqTrackerA: Ileja ehlelekile yayo yonke ibheja - iziteki, amathuba, imiphumela, kanye nenzuzo - ene-ROI ezenzakalelayo, isivuno, nokuhlukaniswa esikhundleni samafomula esipredishithi asenziwa mathupha.
home.faqOddsA: Idesimali, i-American, i-fractional, i-Hong Kong, isi-Malaysian, nesi-Indonesian. Konke ukubheja kugcinwa nge-canonical decimal odds ukuze kubikwe.
home.faqKellyA: Faka amathuba omuntu siqu okubheja. Nge-bankroll kanye nesiphindaphindi sika-Kelly esisethwe kuzilungiselelo, uhlelo lokusebenza luncoma isiteki esisekelwe onqenqemeni lwakho olushilo.
home.faqExportA: Yebo - I-CSV, i-Excel, ne-JSON ithumela ngaphandle kanye nokhiye be-API ukuze uthole ukufinyelela okuhleliwe kurekhodi lakho.
home.faqTipsterA: Cha. i-mybetrecord igcina amarekhodi kanye nezibalo kuphela. Asithengisi ukukhetha noma sithembisa inzuzo.
home.rg: Ukugembula okunesibopho. Ukubheja kufanele kube ukuzijabulisa, hhayi imali engenayo. Ungalokothi ubeke esigxotsheni esingaphezu kwalokho ongakwazi ukukukhokhela. Uma ukugembula kuthinta impilo yakho, funa usizo ezinhlanganweni BeGambleAware noma Ukwelashwa Kokugembula. i-mybetrecord ayikusizi ukubheja — ikusiza ukuthi uqonde owakho umlando.
home.ctaLead: Dala i-akhawunti yamahhala bese ufaka ukubheja kwakho kokuqala ngaphansi kweminithi.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Izibalo nokugcinwa kwamarekhodi — hhayi iseluleko sokugembula.

blog.indexSub: Funda izibalo ezingemuva kwamamethrikhi — bese uzilandelela encwadini yakho.
blog.ctaLead: Ukubheja kwelogi, bona i-ROI bese ukhiqiza, kanye neziteki zikasayizi noKelly — i-akhawunti yamahhala.
blog.rg: Ukugembula okunesibopho. Okuqukethwe kwezemfundo kuphela — hhayi iseluleko sokubheja. Ungalokothi ubeke esigxotsheni esingaphezu kwalokho ongakwazi ukukukhokhela.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: Isipredishithi vs I-Tracker Yokubheja Ezinikezele
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Lapho i-Excel yanele irekhodi lakho lokubheja — nalapho i-tracker ezinikele igcina isikhathi, amaphutha, nezindawo eziyimpumputhe.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
AmaSpredishithi ayisiqalo somhlaba wonke samarekhodi okubheja. Zikhululekile, ziyavumelana nezimo, futhi ziyajwayelekile. Abaningi ababhejayo abalokothi babashiye. Abanye bashaya odongeni — ngokuvamile lapho ubunkimbinkimbi bukhula ngaphandle kwamaseli namafomula.

Uma amaspredishithi esebenza

  • Ngaphansi kuka-~50 ukubheja ngenyanga
  • Imidlalo eyodwa, uhlobo lwemali olulodwa, amathuba edesimali kuphela
  • Imiphumela elula yokuwina/ukulahlekelwa, ayikho ikhomishini yendlela ngayinye noma yokushintshisana
  • Ujabulela ukugcina amafomula

Lapho amaspredishithi ephuka khona

Inkinga Ubuhlungu besipredishithi Inzuzo yomkhondo Amafomethi we-Odds Amakholomu okuguqulwa mathupha Ukujwayela okuzenzakalelayo Indlela ngayinye / EW Amafomula okuhlukanisa anephutha Indawo yokuhlala eyakhelwe ngaphakathi Kelly sizing Yakha kabusha lapho i-bankroll ishintsha Isincomo esibukhoma ngokubheja ngakunye CLV Amakholomu engeziwe, kulula ukweqa Inkundla kukho konke ukubheja Ukwephulwa Ukulungiswa kwetafula le-Pivot Ukuchofoza kanye nge-sport/tipster API / automation Izikripthi ezintekenteke Okhiye besigaba sokuqala se-API Ukufakwa kweselula I-Clunky Uhlelo lokusebenza lwewebhu oluphendulayo

Izindleko ezifihliwe: isikhathi

Imizuzu eyishumi ngeviki ukulungisa amafomula kanye namaphutha wokukopisha nokunamathisela kudlula izindleko zethuluzi elizinikele lanoma ubani obheja ngokuzimisela. Izindleko ezinkulu izinqumo ezimbi ezivela kudatha embi — isikhala esifakwe njengokulahlekelwa, ikhomishini ekhohliwe.

Indlela yokufuduka

  1. Thekelisa noma yini onayo (i-CSV ilungile)
  2. Ngenisa noma ukhiye kabusha ukubheja kwesizini yakamuva
  3. Qalisa ngokuhambisana amaviki amabili — amanani kufanele afane
  4. Yeka isipredishithi uma imibiko ivuma

Okungafanele kwenziwe i-tracker

Akumele ithengise okukhethiwe, ithembise i-ROI, noma ithathele indawo isiyalo se-bankroll. i-mybetrecord ihlaziya futhi igcina amarekhodi — ispredishithi ongeke ukwazi ukusephula ngephutha.

Zama kokubili ngokwethembeka

Gcina ishidi lakho inyanga eyodwa kodwa faka ukubheja okusha ku-mybetrecord. Qhathanisa inzuzo yokuphela kwenyanga kanye nenzuzo. Uma zifana futhi isilandeleli silondoloza isikhathi, shintsha.

Qala mahhala: Dala i-akhawunti — alikho ikhadi elidingekayo ukuze uqalise ukuloga.

betting-equity-curve.title: Ukufunda Ijika Lakho Lokulingana Lokubheja
betting-equity-curve.description: Ijika lokulingana lihlela inzuzo enqwabelene ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Funda ukuthi basho ukuthini izimo, kungani ukubheja okulindile kungafakwa, nokuthi ungakubona kanjani ukukhukhuleka.
betting-equity-curve.body:
I-ijika le-equity liyishadi lomugqa wenzuzo eqoqwayo (noma i-bankroll) ngemva kokubheja ngakunye okuxazululiwe, ngokulandelana kwesikhathi. Iphendula ithebula lemiphumela ibe indaba ongayifunda lapho uthi nhla.

Yeka ukuthi ijika elinempilo libukeka kanjani

Unqenqema oluhle olunomugqa ozwakalayo lukhiqiza ukukhukhuleka okuya phezulu okunokudonsa phansi — hhayi umugqa oqondile. Izikhathi ezimfushane eziyisicaba noma eziphansi ziwukuhluka okuvamile; ukukhukhuleka okuqinile ngokumelene nawe kungase kubonise ukubola kwemodeli noma ukushelela kokuziphatha.

Izimo zejika ezivamile

Ukugaya okuqinile — imiphetho emincane, ezemidlalo ezihlukile (ezinye izimakethe zokushintshisana). Umthambeka ongashoni, imiphetho emincane.

Ama-Volatile spikes — amaphothifoliyo aneshot-asindayo. Amandla amakhulu; I-ROI iyodwa ilahlekisa ngaphandle kokuqukethwe kwesiteki.

Ukwehla kwe-cliff — iziteki ngokuvamile zikhuphuka ngemva kwe-hot streak (indlela yokuziphatha okungeyona eka-Kelly) noma ukushintsha isu phakathi kwesampula.

Ukubhejwa okulindile

Ababheja abangazinzile akufanele bavele kwijika le-equity — abakazitholi i-P/L okwamanje. Ukuzihlanganisa kukhulisa noma kucekela phansi umugqa ngendlela engelona iqiniso.

I-Bankroll vs ijika lenzuzo

Esinye isiqephu samashadi ukuqala i-bankroll + inzuzo eqoqwayo; abanye baceba inzuzo kuphela. Qondanisa ishadi nendlela ophatha ngayo imali ngokwengqondo. Ijika le-mybetrecord’ lisebenzisa inzuzo elungisiwe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi; i-bankroll kwithikha ihlanganisa i-bankroll yakho emisiwe emisiwe kanye ne-P/L eqashiwe.

Ukusebenzisa ijika ngokuxilonga

  1. Maka izinguquko emugqeni wesikhathi (ezemidlalo ezintsha, i-tipster entsha)
  2. Qhathanisa umthambeko wejika ngaphambi/ngemuva koshintsho
  3. Isigxobo esimaphakathi sokunqwabelanisa — ingabe ukwehluka kuqhutshwa yisiteki noma kuqhutshwa emaphethelweni?

Bhanqa namanye ama-metrics

Amajika okulingana alele ngokushiywa ngaphandle uma uziba i-CLV, isivuno, nosayizi wesampula. Sebenzisa ijika ukuze uthole intuition; sebenzisa amatafula ukwenza izinqumo.

Buka ijika lakho lokulingana emibikweni ye-mybetrecord ngemva kokuloga ukubheja okulingene okumbalwa.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: Kuchaziwe Ukubhejwa Kwendlela Ngayinye
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Ukubhejwa kwendlela ngayinye kukhokha kanjani ekuwinile nasezintweni zendawo. Izibonelo ezisebenzayo ezinezingxenye zendawo kanye nemithetho yokushisa okufile.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
Ukubheja ngendlela ngayinye ukubheja okubili endaweni eyodwa: uhhafu wesiteki ekukhethweni ukuze uwine, uhhafu kukho ukuze ubeke (qeda ezindaweni ngokwemigomo yebhuku). Izibalo zokukhokha zikhuphula amaspredishithi amaningi.

Isakhiwo

Isamba sokuhlukaniswa kwesigxobo S:

  • Ingxenye yokuwina: S/2 kuma-win odds
  • Beka ingxenye: S/2 ezindaweni ezixakile

Amathuba wendawo = 1 + (wina amathuba − 1) × isiqephu sendawo

Ingxenye evamile yendawo: 1/4 noma 1/5 yama-win odds.

Isibonelo — owinile

£20 njalo (£10 win + £10 indawo) at 10.00 win odds, 1/4 imigomo yendawo.

  • Ingxenye yokuwina ekhokhayo: 10 × £10 = £100 imbuyiselo (£90 inzuzo)
  • Izingqinamba zendawo: 1 + (10 − 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £10 = £32.50 imbuyiselo (£22.50 inzuzo)
  • Inzuzo ephelele = £90 + £22.50 = £112.50

Isibonelo — ibekwe kuphela

Ukubheja okufanayo, ihhashi liqeda isibili (izindawo ezikhokhelwayo, aziwini):

  • Ingxenye yokuwina ilahlekelwe: −£10
  • Ingxenye yendawo ewinayo: inzuzo engu-£22.50 njengenhla
  • Inzuzo yonke = £12.50

Isibonelo — akubekwe endaweni

Zombili izingxenye ziyalahleka: −£20 (isigxobo esigcwele).

Izimo zokushintshana nezikhethekile

Ukushintshanisa kuvame ukwehlukanisa izimakethe zokuwina nendawo — hhayi ithikithi elilodwa lokuya ngakunye. Ukushisa okufile kunciphisa ukubuyiswa kwendawo. Ukudonswa komthetho 4 kuyasebenza ezingxenyeni eziwinayo zomjaho.

Hlala urekhoda each_way=true kanye ne-place_fraction encwadini yakho ukuze isofthiwe isebenzise ifomula efanayo njalo.

Landela indlela ngayinye ku-mybetrecord

Shintsha indlela ngayinye ekungeneni kokubheja, setha ingxenyenamba yendawo, futhi uvumele ukukhokha kubuyise inzuzo uma umaka imiphumela yokuwina/ukulahlekelwa/ebekiwe.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Amafomethi we-Odds - Idesimali, i-American, ne-Fractional
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: Guqula phakathi kwedesimali, i-American, kanye ne-fractional odds. Ithebula lereferensi namafomula amafomethi e-Hong Kong, isi-Malaysian, nesi-Indonesian.
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Ababhuki emhlabeni wonke babonisa amanani ngendlela ehlukile. Incwadi eqondisiwe igcina idesimali ye-canonical eyodwa ngaphakathi kuyilapho ikuvumela ukuthi ubhalisele ukubheja nganoma iyiphi ifomethi oyibona esikrinini.

Idesimali (yaseYurophu)

Isamba sembuyiselo yeyunithi ngayinye yesiteki kuhlanganise nesiteki. Idesimali engu-2.50 → wina inzuzo engu-£1.50 ku-£1 esiteki.

Inzuzo = isiteki × (idesimali − 1)

I-American (i-moneyline)

Okuhle (+150): inzuzo esiteki sika-£100. +150 → idesimali 2.50.

Okubi (−200): inani elidingekayo ukuze uwine u-£100. −200 → idesimali 1.50.

Ukuguqulwa:

  • Uma umMelika > 0: idesimali = 1 + American/100
  • Uma i-American < 0: idesimali = 1 + 100/|American|

I-Fractional (UK)

6/4 isho ukuthi uwine u-£6 kuwo wonke ama-£4 esiteki. Idesimali = 1 + inombolo/idenominator = 2.50.

Amanye amasayithi abonisa “6/4” njengengxenye yokuwina kuphela; qinisekisa njalo ukuthi isigxobo sifakiwe ekubonisweni.

Amafomethi we-Asian

Ifomethi Isibonelo Idesimali I-Hong Kong 0.85 1.85 Malaysian + 0.85 1.85 Malaysian − −0.85 1 + 1/0.85 ≈ 2.176 Isi-Indonesian + 1.50 2.50 Isi-Indonesian − −1.50 1 + 1/1.50 ≈ 1.667

Kungani ukujwayela kubalulekile

Ukuxuba amafomethi kusipredishithi esisodwa kubangela amaphutha athulile — Izimpawu zokususa zaseMelika, amadenominayitha ayingxenye, noma ukuphatha i-HK njengedesimali. Isoftware kufanele iguqule okokufakayo futhi ingalahlekelwa ukunemba.

Ithiphu elisebenzayo

Setha ifomethi yokufaka ezenzakalelayo kusilandeleli sakho esimesha ubhuki wakho oyinhloko, kodwa qinisekisa inani ledesimali ekulondolozweni kuze kube yilapho umkhuba uqhubeka.

i-mybetrecord yamukela wonke amafomethi asohlwini futhi igcina amanani edesimali kuwo wonke umbiko kanye nokubala kuka-Kelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: I-Closing Line Value (CLV) — Why Sharp Bettors Track It
closing-line-value-clv.description: Inani lomugqa wokuvala lilinganisa ukuthi uyalidlula intengo yemakethe yokugcina. Funda indlela yokubala i-CLV nokuthi kungani ibikezela ikhono lesikhathi eside.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Ivelu yomugqa wokuvala (i-CLV) iqhathanisa izingqinamba owathatha ngokumelene nezingqinamba ezitholakala lapho imakethe ivala (imvamisa ukukhahlela noma umjaho). Ukushaya eduze ngokungaguquki kungenye yezibikezelo eziqine kakhulu zenzuzo yesikhathi eside — kunamandla kune-P/L yenyanga yenhlanhla.

Kungani umugqa wokuvala ubalulekile

Imininingwane yezimakethe. Intengo yokuvala ibonisa isilinganiso esibukhali esitholakalayo ngaphambi komcimbi. Uma ngokuvamile uthola u-2.10 lapho kuvala kungu-2.00, uthola inani ngaphambi kokuba imakethe ilungise.

Ibala i-CLV

Incazelo evamile:

CLV % = (izibalo zakho zedesimali ÷ ukuvala amathuba edesimali − 1) × 100%

Isibonelo: ubheje ngo-2.20, ukuvala kwakungu-2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 − 1) × 100 = +10%

I-CLV enegethivu isho ukuthi wenze okubi kakhulu kunokuvalwa — ngisho nokubheja owinile kungaba ukubheja kwenqubo embi.

CLV iqhudelana nemiphumela

Ukwehluka kufihla ikhono phezu kwamasampuli amancane. Ungalahlekelwa yimali nge-CLV ephozithivu amasonto, noma uwine nge-CLV enegethivu ku-heater. Landelela i-CLV phezu kwamakhulu okubheja ukuze uhlulele inqubo.

Ongakuqopha

Ngokubheja ngakunye, gcina:

  • Amathuba owathathile (noma iyiphi ifomethi)
  • Ukuvala izingqinamba (imakethe efanayo, ukukhetha okufanayo)
  • Isitembu sesikhathi uma ulayini uhamba phakathi kosuku

Ukushintshana kuvaliwe kuyahluka ekuvaleni kwebhuku elithambile — hlala unjalo kudathasethi yakho.

Imikhawulo

  • Umugqa wokuvala awulona iqiniso eliyisisekelo — ukunyakaza kwesitimu nakho kungaba okungalungile
  • Amathuba okukhangisa nokuthuthukisa ukuqhathanisa okuhlanekezelwe
  • Izimakethe ezincane zinezivalo ezinomsindo

Sebenzisa i-CLV ku-mybetrecord

Engeza amathuba okuvala ekubhejeni noma ekuhleleni. Imibiko ingavela ngokwesilinganiso se-CLV eduze ne-ROI ukuze uhlukanise inhlanhla emaphethelweni.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: U-Kelly Criterion Uchazelwe Ababhejiyo
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Usayizi wombandela ka-Kelly uncike kakhulu emaphethelweni kanye nama-odds. Funda ifomula, u-Kelly oyingxenye, kanye nesibonelo sezinombolo ongasiqinisekisa.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
Umbandela u-Kelly uphendula umbuzo owodwa: uma ubheka umkhawulo wakho olinganiselwe, iyiphi ingxenye ye-bankroll okufanele uyibambe ukuze ukhuphule ukukhula kwesikhathi eside — ngaphandle kokufaka engcupheni yokonakala ngenxa yokusebenza okubi okukodwa?

Ifomula (izibalo zedesimali)

Okwamanqamu wedesimali O kanye namathuba okuwina p:

Ingxenyana kaKelly = (O × p − 1) / (O − 1)

Isiteki = Ingxenyana ka-Kelly × i-bankroll (imvamisa iphindaphindwa isici sokuphepha).

Isibonelo sezinombolo

Ukholelwa ukuthi iqembu linethuba elingu-55% lokuwina ngama-decimal odds 2.00 (ngisho nemali).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 − 1) / (2.0 − 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% ye-bankroll

Ebhange elingu-£1,000, u-Kelly ogcwele uphakamisa u-£100. Ababheji abaningi basebenzisa uhhafu u-Kelly (5%, £50) noma ikota u-Kelly ukuze banciphise ukuhluka.

Unqenqema olusuka kokusho okuthile okungasho lutho

Uma “ilungile” intengo yidesimali engu-1.91 (okushiwo u-52.4%) futhi uthola u-2.00 (okushiwo u-50%), unomkhawulo omuhle. U-Kelly uguqula lolo mkhawulo kanye namathuba okunikezwayo abe usayizi wesiteki.

Kungani ungagcwali njalo u-Kelly?

U-Kelly ogcwele ukhulisa ukukhula kwejiyomethri kuthiyori. Ngokusebenza:

  • Isilinganiso sakho se-p asilungile kaningi kunalokho ocabanga ngakho
  • Ukubheja ngasikhathi sinye kuhambisana (iligi efanayo, usuku olufanayo)
  • Ukuphazamiseka kwengqondo kubangela ukulahlwa kwesistimu

I-Fractional Kelly (0.25–0.5×) isezingeni phakathi kwababheji abangochwepheshe.

Amaphutha ajwayelekile

  • Usebenzisa u-Kelly uma ungenakho isilinganiso sangempela somkhawulo
  • Ukusebenzisa u-Kelly kuma-parlays ahlobene njengemicimbi ezimele
  • Ukuziba i-bankroll okungeyona “imali yobungozi”

Landela u-Kelly ku-mybetrecord

Setha i-bankroll kanye nesiphindaphindi sika-Kelly kuzilungiselelo. Faka izingqinamba zomuntu siqu ekubhejweni ngakunye ukuze ubone isiteki esinconywayo eduze kwesiteki sakho sangempela — ukuhlola ukuhluzeka kwengqondo, hhayi umyalo.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: I-ROI vs Yield in Sports Betting
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: I-ROI kanye nokusebenza kokubheja kwesilinganiso sesivuno ngokuhlukile. Funda amafomula, izibonelo ezisetshenzisiwe, nokuthi ungasebenzisa nini imethrikhi ngayinye.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
I-

ROI (ukubuyisela ekutshalweni kwezimali) kanye nesivuno izinombolo ezimbili eziyinhloko ezicashuniwe zababheji abakhulu. Zihlobene kodwa azishintsheki — ukusebenzisa okungalungile kungenza ukuphumula kwenyanga kubukeke njengenhlekelele, noma okuphambene nalokho.

Izincazelo

ROI = inzuzo ephelele ÷ isamba seziteki × 100%

Isivuno = inzuzo ephelele ÷ inani lenzuzo × 100%

Kumuntu obhejayo onesiteki esiphansi ongalokothi andise usayizi, inzuzo ilingana neziteki futhi izinombolo ziyahambisana. Uma iziteki zihluka - ukulinganisa kuka-Kelly, ukuhlanganisa, noma amayunithi axubile - ayahlukana.

Isibonelo esisebenzayo

Ake sithi ngaphezu kwe-10 yokubheja ekhokhelwayo ubeke u-£100 isikhathi ngasinye (isamba esingu-£1,000 seziteki) futhi wenze inzuzo engu-£50.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
  • Isivuno = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%

Manje ake sithi ukubheja okukodwa kube ngu-£500 kanti okunye kube ngu-£50 (inani eliphelele lama-£950), inzuzo efanayo engu-£50:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • I-Ield isakhomba inzuzo ngendlela efanayo uma i-turnover = stakes

Ukudideka kuvame ukuvela lapho abantu bexuba i-bankroll ROI (inzuzo ÷ eqala i-bankroll) ne-stake ROI. Hlala ulebula ukuthi iyiphi idinominetha oyishoyo.

Isetshenziswa nini i-ROI

I-ROI yesiteki iyaphendula: “Kuwo wonke upondo engibeke engozini, yimalini ebuyile?” Kuhle ukuqhathanisa amasu anamaphethini esiteki afanayo.

Kusetshenziswa nini isivuno

Inzuzo ngenzuzo ivamile ekubikeni komkhakha nasekucwaningweni kwe-tipster. Igcizelela ukusebenza kahle kweyunithi ngayinye ebhejwayo ngokunganaki usayizi we-bankroll.

Izinga lokuteleka alanele

Izinga lesiteleka elingu-60% ku-avareji yezingqinamba 1.50 lilahlekelwa imali. Bhanqa i-ROI/isivuno esinobunzima obumaphakathi kanye ne-CLV ukuze ubone ukuthi umphetho ungokoqobo noma uhlukile.

Into esebenzayo

Khetha imethrikhi eyodwa eyinhloko futhi unamathele kuyo unyaka nonyaka. i-mybetrecord ibika kokubili inzuzo kanye nenzuzo ekubhejweni okukhokhelwayo ukuze ukwazi ukuvumelanisa nanoma yiliphi izinga elisetshenziswa uhlelo lwakho lokubeka imali.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Iyini Incwadi Yokubheja?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Incwadi yokubheja irekhodi elihlelekile layo yonke ibheji oyibekayo. Funda ukuthi kungani ababheji abaqeqeshiwe begcina eyodwa nokuthi yini okufanele bayilandele.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
I-ibhuku lokubheja limane liyirekhodi eliphelele, lokulandelana kwezikhathi lokubheja kwakho: lokho okwenzele isekela, ngaziphi izinkinga, ngamalini, nokuthi ilungiswe kanjani. Kucabange njengomehluko phakathi kokuqagela ukuthi ulungele isizini kanye nokwazi.

Kungani amaspredishithi ehluleka

Ababheji abaningi baqala ku-Excel noma ku-Google AmaSpredishithi. Lokho kusebenza kuze kube:

  • Amafomula ayaphulwa uma wengeza indlela ngayinye noma ushintshanisa amakholomu wekhomishini
  • Ukhohlwa ukuloga okungenalutho noma ukukhipha imali
  • Awukwazi ukusika nge-tipster noma ezemidlalo ngaphandle kokwakha kabusha amathebula e-pivot

Ibhukwana elizinikele lenza kube lula, libuyisela inzuzo kukho konke ukuhlela, futhi ligcina imibiko ingashintshi.

Ongakuqopha

Okungenani, ngena:

  1. Umcimbi nokukhetha — imininingwane eyanele ukuze ubone izinyanga zokubheja kamuva
  2. Isiteki nemali
  3. Odds (kunoma iyiphi ifomethi eboniswa incwadi)
  4. Umphumela — kusalindile, ukuwina, ukulahlekelwa, ize
  5. Inzuzo elungisiwe — noma uvumele isofthiwe ukuthi iyithole emithethweni yomphumela

Izinkambu ezithuthukisiwe ezihlukanisa ama-tracker abukhali kwabavamile abathatha amanothi:

  • Izingqinamba zomuntu siqu (intengo yakho efanelekile)
  • Amathuba omugqa wokuvala (ye-CLV)
  • I-Tipster noma umthombo wemodeli
  • Ubhuki kanye nekhomishini

I-Ledger vs ijenali

Abantu basebenzisa “ijenali yokubheja” kanye “incwadi yokubheja” ngokushintshana. Ngokuqinile, ijenali ingase ihlanganise amanothi okulandisa (“ngizizwe ngiphuthuma”, “umugqa uhanjisiwe”); ibhuku ligcizelela izinombolo. Amathuluzi angcono kakhulu ahlanganisa kokubili: idatha ehlelekile kanye namanothi ombhalo wamahhala ngokubheja ngakunye.

Ubani oyidingayo?

Noma ubani ophatha ukubheja njengomdlalo wamakhono esikhundleni samathikithi elotho:

  • Ababheji abafanisiwe abalandela ukubheja abafanelekayo kanye nokubheja kwamahhala
  • Abahwebi bokushintshana abakala isivuno esilungiswe ikhomishini
  • Abalandeli be-Tipster abaqinisekisa i-ROI ekhangisiwe
  • Abahloli bezokungcebeleka abafuna ukuphathwa kwebhange ngokwethembeka

Ukuqalisa

Khetha uhlobo olulodwa lwezemidlalo noma lwemakethe bese ufaka ukubheja okulandelayo okungu-20 ngaphandle kokushintsha inqubo yakho. Buyekeza izinga lesimangalo, amathuba amaphakathi, kanye nenzuzo ngeviki. Leso sisekelo sibaluleke kakhulu kunanoma yiliphi ithiphu.

Landelela lokhu ku-mybetrecord: dala i-akhawunti yamahhala, setha i-bankroll yakho kanye nefomethi ye-odds ezenzakalelayo, bese ufaka ukubheja kwakho kokuqala ngaphansi kweminithi.
